header_label: Aula 8 — Getting Around: Directions & Public Transport
accordion_desc: Directions & Public Transport: imperatives + prepositions of place
welcome:
Welcome back, Pricila!

Onboarding

You are settled in your hotel. This week you explore the city: how to ask for directions, understand the answer, and take the metro. Review these emergency phrases before class.

How do I get to the station?
Take the blue line and get off at Central.
Where do I buy a ticket?
Do I have to transfer?
audit:
<!--
SCENARIO FIT — Aula 8
Can-do: "I can ask for directions, understand the answer, and use public transport, giving directions with imperatives and prepositions of place."
Gramatica-alvo: imperativos para direcoes (Go, Take, Turn, Get off) + preposicoes de lugar (next to, across from, between, opposite, behind, on the corner) + "How do I get to...?".
Vocab-alvo: subway, ticket, platform, transfer, fare, stop, line, exit.
Cenario escolhido: estacao de metro / cidade (Pricila sai do hotel para visitar a Opera House e precisa pegar o metro e seguir direcoes).
Por que elicita o alvo: pegar o metro e achar um lugar OBRIGA o aluno a perguntar o caminho, entender imperativos (take/get off/go straight) e localizar coisas com preposicoes (across from the exit). >70% dos itens-alvo (8 vocab + imperativos + preposicoes) sao naturalmente elicitados. Habitat natural do focoLinguistico.

CONTINUIDADE — Aula 8
Itens novos desta aula: subway, ticket, platform, transfer, fare, stop, line, exit; imperativos de direcao + preposicoes de lugar.
Itens revisados (de aulas anteriores): "I would like to..." (Aula 7), vocab de hotel (reception), pedidos educados (Aula 6) e have to (Aula 7, reaproveitado em "Do I have to transfer?").
Callback no warm-up (slide 2): retoma ATIVAMENTE 2 itens da Aula 7 — (1) o aluno completa "Today I would like to..." e (2) usa "reception" para fazer a ponte: pede direcoes na recepcao do hotel e agora precisa entender e pegar o metro.
NB: nenhum item-alvo novo repete vocabulario ja ensinado nas Aulas 1-7.
-->

challenges.prompt: Ask how to get to the Opera House.
challenges.answer: "How do I get to the Opera House?"

challenges.prompt: Tell a tourist to take the metro and get off at Central.
challenges.answer: "Take the blue line and get off at Central."

challenges.prompt: Ask where to buy a ticket.
Ask if the train is direct or you must change.
challenges.answer: "Do I have to transfer, or is it direct?"

challenges.prompt: Say the exit is on the other side of the platform.
challenges.answer: "The exit is across from the platform."

challenges.prompt: Tell someone to walk straight and turn right.
challenges.answer: "Go straight and turn right at the corner."
